terms_hero_subtitle: Please read our terms and conditions carefully before using our services
terms_section_1_content: These Terms of Service govern your use of the website and services provided by Manln Online (hereinafter referred to as 'Company', 'we', 'us' or 'our'). By accessing this website, you fully accept and agree to these terms and conditions.
terms_section_2_content_1: You are granted a limited, non-exclusive and revocable license to use this website for personal and non-commercial purposes, provided that you comply with these terms and conditions.
terms_section_2_content_2: You may not: (a) copy, modify or create derivative works from the website without our express written consent; (b) assign or transfer these rights to any third party; (c) access the website by any unauthorized means or techniques.
terms_section_2_content_3: Violation of these restrictions may result in termination of your access rights and may give rise to legal liability.
terms_section_3_content: The website and services are provided 'as is' without any warranties, express or implied. We disclaim all warranties, including but not limited to warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, and non-infringement.
terms_section_4_content_1: To the fullest extent permitted by law, the Company shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from or related to your use of or inability to use the website or services.
terms_section_4_content_2: Our total liability to you shall not exceed the amount you have paid to us in the previous six (6) months.
terms_section_5_content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time without notice. Your continued use of the website after any changes are posted indicates your acceptance of the modified terms.
terms_contact_content: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us:
privacy_hero_subtitle: We are committed to protecting your privacy. Please read our privacy policy to understand our practices.
privacy_section_1_content: We collect information you provide directly (such as name, email address, phone number) as well as information collected automatically (such as IP address, browser type, access time).
privacy_section_2_content_1: We use your information to: provide, maintain and improve our services; process your transactions; send notifications about products, services and events; respond to your requests and inquiries.
privacy_section_2_content_2: We may use your information for marketing purposes if you have consented. You may opt out at any time by contacting us or clicking the unsubscribe link in emails.
privacy_section_3_content_1: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, modification, or disclosure.
privacy_section_3_content_2: Although we strive to protect your personal information, no method of transmission over the Internet or electronic storage is 100% secure.
privacy_section_3_content_3: You are responsible for keeping all passwords and login information confidential. Please notify us immediately of any unauthorized access to your account.
privacy_section_4_content: We do not sell, trade, or transfer your personal information to third parties without your consent, except when required by law or when necessary to provide our services (such as with logistics providers).
privacy_section_5_content: You have the right to access, modify, or request deletion of your personal data. You also have the right to object to the processing of your data. To exercise any of these rights, please contact us.
privacy_rights_content: Under current data protection regulations, you have the following rights: right of access, right to rectification, right to erasure, right to object, right to restrict processing, and right to data portability.
privacy_contact_content: If you have any questions about this privacy policy or how we handle your personal information, please contact us:
warranty_hero_subtitle: We guarantee the quality of our products with a comprehensive warranty policy
warranty_key_1_desc: All products come with a 12-month manufacturer warranty from the date of purchase
warranty_key_2_desc: Quick repair and replacement service within 5-7 business days
warranty_key_4_desc: Our customer support team is always ready to help you
warranty_coverage_desc: Warranty covers all technical defects caused by the manufacturer within 12 months.
warranty_support_description: If you experience any issues with your product, please contact our support team.
warranty_process_step_1: Step 1: Contact Manln Online with warranty certificate and purchase invoice
warranty_process_step_2: Step 2: We verify the validity of your warranty claim
warranty_process_step_3: Step 3: Send the product to our warranty center (we may provide a shipping label)
warranty_process_step_4: Step 4: Product is inspected and repaired or replaced
warranty_process_step_5: Step 5: Product is returned to you in good condition
warranty_not_covered_1: Damage from accidents, misuse, or abuse
warranty_not_covered_2: Damage from failure to follow instructions
warranty_not_covered_4: However, losses due to drops, liquids, or other impacts
return_hero_subtitle: We want you to be completely satisfied with your purchase. If you're not happy, we'll help you return or exchange your product.
return_key_1_desc: Free returns within 30 days from the date of purchase
return_key_2_desc: Simple returns without detailed explanations required
return_key_3_desc: Exchange for a different product or receive full refund
return_key_4_desc: We cover shipping costs for returns
return_contact_subtitle: We want to make your return process easy. Contact us for support.
return_rejected_1: Product shows signs of heavy use
step_1_desc: Browse thousands of high-quality laptop products
step_2_desc: Select products and add them to your shopping cart
step_3_desc: Choose a secure payment method and complete your order
step_4_desc: Receive your product quickly and safely
tips_selection_1: Identify your needs and required features
tips_selection_2: Compare prices and specs from different suppliers
tips_buying_1: Use discount codes and special offers
tips_buying_2: Shop during promotional periods for better prices
tips_buying_3: Check voucher expiration dates before purchasing
tips_buying_4: Call our consultants for additional discounts
tips_after_1: Inspect the product when you receive it
tips_after_2: Keep your invoice and warranty certificate
tips_after_3: Register your product for warranty online
tips_after_4: Contact us if you have any issues
faq_1_answer: Shipping typically takes 2-5 business days depending on your delivery address.
faq_2_answer: Yes, all products come with a 12-month manufacturer warranty.
faq_3_answer: Yes, you can return items within 30 days for a full refund.
faq_4_answer: Yes, we offer product exchanges within 30 days.
faq_5_answer: We accept credit cards, debit cards, online banking, and cash on delivery.
faq_6_answer: Yes, our customer support team is available 24/7 via phone, email, and chat.
